message.content:
Use WebSearch to find companies hiring freshers/2026 graduates in India for AI Engineer, ML Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, AI Product Engineer roles at 15+ LPA.

Search these queries:
1. "AI startups india bangalore hiring freshers 2026 engineer 15 lpa"
2. "generative AI companies india hiring fresh graduates 2026"
3. "forward deployed engineer india fresher 2026 salary"
4. "LLM AI startup india hiring software engineer fresher"
5. "sarvam ai krutrim zomato ai india hiring freshers 2026"
6. site:ycombinator.com/companies india AI 2024 2025 hiring
7. "top AI ML companies india 2026 fresher package"

Compile 80-100 unique companies. Return ONLY a pipe-separated list like:
CompanyName | Role | Type(Startup/MNC)

DO NOT include: weights biases, scale ai, labelbox, together ai, replicate, modal, codeium, sourcegraph, turing, palantir, glean, singlestore, 6sense, signoz, emergent ai, nexusvoid ai, phronetic ai, latentforce ai, axiado, cartesia, deeprunner, bolna, ringg ai, arva ai, tejas ai, sennu ai, lopus ai, atlas ai, penguin ai, steps ai, sensesemi

content.text: I'll run all 7 searches in parallel to compile the company list efficiently.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Forward Deployed Engineer salaries in India for 2026:

## Overall India Salary Range

The average salary for a Forward Deployed Engineer is ₹13,00,000 per year in India. The typical pay range in India is between ₹10,50,000 (25th percentile) and ₹15,70,000 (75th percentile) annually.

## New Delhi Specific

For the New Delhi region specifically, salaries are slightly higher. The average salary for a Forward Deployed Engineer is ₹13,10,000 per year in New Delhi, which is 1% higher than the national average. The typical pay range in New Delhi is between ₹10,00,000 (25th percentile) and ₹14,20,000 (75th percentile) annually.

## For AI-Specialized FDEs

If you're looking at AI Forward Deployed Engineer roles specifically, the compensation is significantly higher. The average ai forward deployed engineer gross salary in India is ₹28,11,747 or an equivalent hourly rate of ₹1,352.

## Important Note

The search results provided salary data for experienced Forward Deployed Engineers rather than fresh graduates specifically. For fresher/entry-level positions, salaries would typically be at the lower end of these ranges or potentially lower, though specific fresher salary data for this role wasn't available in the search results.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about generative AI companies hiring fresh graduates in India in 2026:

## Top Companies Hiring AI Freshers

Top companies hiring AI freshers in India include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Cognizant for structured training programs, as well as product companies like Flipkart, Swiggy, Zepto, and PhonePe. Additionally, tech giants like Google, IBM, and Microsoft also regularly offer career opportunities in AI roles.

## In-Demand Roles

Roles such as AI Specialist, Generative AI Engineer, and Digital Content Creator are among the fastest-growing for fresh graduates. The hottest new role in 2026 is Generative AI Engineer / LLM Engineer, where engineers work specifically with large language models — building RAG systems, fine-tuning models, creating AI agents, and deploying LLM-powered products. Even freshers with strong portfolios can command ₹10 to ₹20 LPA.

## Salary Expectations

Freshers entering AI roles can expect ₹5 to ₹12 LPA as a starting package, while strong candidates with real project portfolios and demonstrated skills in Python and ML frameworks start at ₹8 to ₹15 LPA.

## Key Hiring Hubs

Cities expected to have the most AI job openings in 2026 include Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, and Gurugram.

## Job Availability

There are 5,463 open jobs for Generative AI engineers in India, and 660 Generative AI Engineer jobs are listed on LinkedIn, demonstrating significant hiring activity in this field.

Web search results for query: "AI startups india bangalore hiring freshers 2026 engineer 15 lpa"

Links: [{"title":"Fresher Artificial Intelligence Jobs In Bangalore","url":"https://www.naukri.com/fresher-artificial-intelligence-jobs-in-bangalore"},{"title":"AI Engineer Jobs in Bengaluru, India - 2026 | Wellfound","url":"https://wellfound.com/role/l/ai-engineer/bangalore"},{"title":"AI Engineer Salary India 2026 – Complete Guide [City + Role]","url":"https://shifttotech.co.in/blog/ai-engineer-salary-india"},{"title":"AI Jobs in India Salary (2026): Complete Pay Guide","url":"https://www.buildfastwithai.com/blogs/ai-jobs-india-salary-2026"},{"title":"Top AI Skills for Freshers in India 2026 Complete Guide","url":"https://cambridgeinfotech.io/top-ai-skills-for-freshers-in-india-2026/"},{"title":"Best Artificial Intelligence Companies to Work for in Bengaluru, India 2026 | Wellfound","url":"https://wellfound.com/startups/l/bangalore/artificial-intelligence"},{"title":"1,000 Ai Startups Job Vacancies in Bengaluru, Karnataka | Indeed","url":"https://in.indeed.com/q-ai-startups-l-bengaluru,-karnataka-jobs.html"},{"title":"1000+ Ai Startup jobs in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India","url":"https://in.linkedin.com/jobs/ai-startup-jobs-bengaluru"},{"title":"Generative AI Engineer Salary in India 2026 | Career Growth","url":"https://brollyai.com/generative-ai-engineer-salary-in-india/"},{"title":"50+ Artificial Intelligence (AI) Jobs in Bangalore (Bengaluru) | Artificial Intelligence (AI) Job openings in Bangalore (Bengaluru) | Cutshort","url":"https://cutshort.io/jobs/artificial-intelligence-ai-jobs-in-bangalore-bengaluru"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about AI startups in Bangalore hiring freshers in 2026 for engineer roles with 15 LPA compensation:

## Salary Expectations for Freshers

IIT graduates joining FAANG India directly can receive ₹15 LPA and above, which suggests that the 15 LPA mark is achievable for top freshers. More broadly, entry-level GenAI roles start at 8-15 LPA for freshers with relevant project experience.

For startups specifically, freshers with strong GitHub portfolios joining product companies or startups can start at ₹8–12 LPA, which is slightly below the 15 LPA target. However, product companies and startups offer 80,000 to 1,25,000 per month for freshers with strong portfolios and GenAI skills, which translates to roughly 9.6-15 LPA annually.

## Bangalore's Position

Bangalore pays the highest average AI engineer salary at ₹12.67 LPA (Glassdoor, Feb 2026), and the city hosts Google, Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, and hundreds of AI startups that routinely pay 15-40 LPA for mid-senior roles.

## Job Market Platforms

You can find relevant opportunities on job portals like Naukri, Wellfound, LinkedIn, and Indeed, which list active AI startup hiring in Bangalore with various engineering roles. Fresher salary range in Bangalore: ₹7–16 LPA depending on which technical AI skills you combine.

To reach the 15 LPA mark as a fresher, focus on building strong skills in GenAI, LLMs, or specialized Python/ML frameworks, as well as a robust GitHub portfolio and relevant project experience.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about AI hiring at these companies in India for 2026:

## Sarvam AI

Sarvam AI's expansion following ₹246 crore IndiaAI Mission funding created 50+ engineering positions. Current open engineering roles include Frontend Engineer (React Native), DevOps Engineer, Backend Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, Machine Learning Engineer for Speech AI, and Site Reliability Engineer.

## Krutrim

Krutrim's deployment plans require 100+ AI engineers through 2026.

## Zomato AI

The search results don't contain specific information about Zomato AI's freshers hiring program for 2026.

## Hiring Approach for Freshers

AI and technology startups like Sarvam AI and Krutrim hire based on skills and project portfolios, not college pedigree. Indian AI-first startups (Sarvam AI, Krutrim, Yellow.ai) pay ₹8–18 LPA to freshers with strong skills.

Portfolio and practical skills matter infinitely more than degrees or certificates for landing these roles. You can explore opportunities on platforms like Wellfound where Sarvam AI, Krutrim, and others recruit.

Based on the search results, here's comprehensive information about LLM AI startup hiring for freshers in India for 2025-2026:

## Market Overview

There are 50,000+ open AI/ML positions in India as of December 2025, with only ~15,000 qualified candidates, creating a demand-to-supply ratio of 3.3:1. India needs at least 1 million skilled AI professionals by 2026.

## Fresher Salary Expectations

Freshers in AI/ML earn ₹8-18 LPA, with LLM Engineers commanding the highest salaries at ₹18-28 LPA for freshers. Entry-level GenAI roles start at INR 8–12 LPA for freshers with relevant project exposure.

## Top Hiring AI Startups

AI Startups like Krutrim and Sarvam AI offer ₹25-70 LPA, though this typically applies to experienced candidates.

## Key Skills in Demand

Modern LLM skills companies are hiring for include: Using Hugging Face Transformers, Calling LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini), Building RAG pipelines using LangChain, Fine-tuning models with LoRA/QLoRA.

## Job Locations

Bangalore leads with 40% (20,000+ jobs) offering ₹18-90 LPA, Hyderabad has 25% (12,500+ jobs) at ₹15-70 LPA, while Pune, Delhi-NCR, Mumbai, Chennai combined have 35% of jobs at ₹10-35 LPA.

## Hiring Platforms

You can find opportunities on platforms like Wellfound, Cutshort, Hirist.tech, and LinkedIn's job portal.

Based on my search results, here's comprehensive information about top AI/ML companies in India hiring freshers in 2026:

## Top AI/ML Companies Hiring Freshers in 2026

Top companies hiring for artificial intelligence roles include tech giants like Google, IBM, Microsoft, Tata Consultancy Services, Infosys, and Wipro, among others that regularly offer career opportunities in this dynamic field.

### Major Product-Based Companies

Google, a pioneer in technology, continues to be a frontrunner in ML. With products like Google Search, Google Photos, and TensorFlow, the company provides an ideal environment for freshers to work on diverse ML projects.

Microsoft is not just a software giant; it's also a key player in AI and ML. Azure Machine Learning, Microsoft's cloud-based ML platform, is a testament to its commitment to the field. Fresh ML engineers at Microsoft get the chance to work on a variety of projects, from natural language processing to computer vision.

### IT Services Companies

TCS remains India's largest recruiter of freshers, and 2026 is no exception. In FY26, the company aims to recruit approximately 42,000 freshers, making it one of the largest entry-level hiring drives in the nation.

Wipro estimates that 10,000-12,000 new students will be recruited by 2026 for IT services- and consulting-led roles in the group's new services.

## Fresher Package & Salary Information

Freshers usually start as junior data scientists, ML trainees, or AI associates. Salary typically ranges between ₹3–8 LPA.

## Key Hiring Cities

Some of the cities expected to have the most AI job openings in 2026 include Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, and Gurugram, as these are key technology hubs in India leading the demand for artificial intelligence talent.

## Campus Hiring Opportunities

Campus placement programs, national-level tests (like TCS NQT), and skill-based hiring platforms are key entry points for freshers.

The demand for AI/ML talent in India continues to be strong, with companies actively recruiting freshers through campus drives, online assessments, and skill-based hiring models.
